## Meeting Purpose

[Align on progress and next steps for Vapi's pSEO and editorial content strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/q-J8ycNMb2Yyzy53wEHkGmZRmX_cpo_1?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Focus on delivering a first programmatic page ASAP to show progress](https://fathom.video/share/q-J8ycNMb2Yyzy53wEHkGmZRmX_cpo_1?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)
  - [Develop editorial content strategy further, especially for technical topics](https://fathom.video/share/q-J8ycNMb2Yyzy53wEHkGmZRmX_cpo_1?tab=summary&timestamp=1174.0)
  - [Prioritize calibration article and content OS development for tomorrow's client call](https://fathom.video/share/q-J8ycNMb2Yyzy53wEHkGmZRmX_cpo_1?tab=summary&timestamp=1557.0)
  - [Balance hand-crafted, in-depth content with quicker wins using existing workflows](https://fathom.video/share/q-J8ycNMb2Yyzy53wEHkGmZRmX_cpo_1?tab=summary&timestamp=1640.0)

## Topics

### Programmatic SEO Progress

  - [Ren (CTO) created a Figma design and Loom walkthrough for the first page](https://fathom.video/share/q-J8ycNMb2Yyzy53wEHkGmZRmX_cpo_1?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)
  - [Team to refine design, focusing on showcasing experience and interactions](https://fathom.video/share/q-J8ycNMb2Yyzy53wEHkGmZRmX_cpo_1?tab=summary&timestamp=205.0)
  - [Goal: Get client approval on features to build the first live page quickly](https://fathom.video/share/q-J8ycNMb2Yyzy53wEHkGmZRmX_cpo_1?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)
  - [Emphasize progress made and high-level talent (e.g., Ren) involved in the project](https://fathom.video/share/q-J8ycNMb2Yyzy53wEHkGmZRmX_cpo_1?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)

### Editorial Content Strategy

  - [Develop clusters further with descriptions and deeper research](https://fathom.video/share/q-J8ycNMb2Yyzy53wEHkGmZRmX_cpo_1?tab=summary&timestamp=923.0)
  - [Focus on technical topics like TTS, STT, and related terminology](https://fathom.video/share/q-J8ycNMb2Yyzy53wEHkGmZRmX_cpo_1?tab=summary&timestamp=1174.0)
  - [Create a tree-like structure of concepts, starting broad and going deeper](https://fathom.video/share/q-J8ycNMb2Yyzy53wEHkGmZRmX_cpo_1?tab=summary&timestamp=1197.0)
  - [Balance in-depth, hand-crafted content with quicker wins using existing workflows](https://fathom.video/share/q-J8ycNMb2Yyzy53wEHkGmZRmX_cpo_1?tab=summary&timestamp=1640.0)
  - [Aim to produce unique, original content when possible](https://fathom.video/share/q-J8ycNMb2Yyzy53wEHkGmZRmX_cpo_1?tab=summary&timestamp=1473.0)

### Client Communication

  - [Present a practical, fast-paced approach to match client's style](https://fathom.video/share/q-J8ycNMb2Yyzy53wEHkGmZRmX_cpo_1?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)
  - [Show progress on both programmatic and editorial fronts](https://fathom.video/share/q-J8ycNMb2Yyzy53wEHkGmZRmX_cpo_1?tab=summary&timestamp=569.0)
  - [Aim to extend tomorrow's call to 45-60 minutes if possible](https://fathom.video/share/q-J8ycNMb2Yyzy53wEHkGmZRmX_cpo_1?tab=summary&timestamp=827.0)
  - [Prepare a Loom video showcasing programmatic progress before the call](https://fathom.video/share/q-J8ycNMb2Yyzy53wEHkGmZRmX_cpo_1?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)

### Team Responsibilities

  - [Branko to lead on programmatic SEO and client relationship](https://fathom.video/share/q-J8ycNMb2Yyzy53wEHkGmZRmX_cpo_1?tab=summary&timestamp=1955.0)
  - [Jürgen to focus on editorial strategy and calibration article](https://fathom.video/share/q-J8ycNMb2Yyzy53wEHkGmZRmX_cpo_1?tab=summary&timestamp=1986.0)
  - [Matt to work exclusively on Vapi content](https://fathom.video/share/q-J8ycNMb2Yyzy53wEHkGmZRmX_cpo_1?tab=summary&timestamp=1473.0)

### Next Steps

  - [Refine programmatic page design for client presentation](https://fathom.video/share/q-J8ycNMb2Yyzy53wEHkGmZRmX_cpo_1?tab=summary&timestamp=163.0)

  - [Develop content OS further to showcase progress](https://fathom.video/share/q-J8ycNMb2Yyzy53wEHkGmZRmX_cpo_1?tab=summary&timestamp=910.0)
